subject: A swarm of large reptilian creatures overruns a frontier town, destroying wagons and buildings
description: A wide chaotic scene of a western frontier town being overrun by a horde of large reptilian creatures — armored, segmented, and varied in size from small ground-crawlers to a massive flying creature dominating the upper right. Wooden structures, wagons, crates, and fences are smashed and scattered. At least one humanoid figure is visible clinging to or falling from a wrecked wagon. Dust and debris fill the air. The creatures share a similar rusty-brown color scheme with pale underbellies and segmented armor plating. The sky is hazy with dust clouds and the town appears thoroughly devastated.
foreground: Multiple large armored reptilian creatures swarming through wreckage of wagons and crates
background: Frontier town buildings being destroyed, dust-filled sky, flying creature overhead
emotion: Overwhelming, unstoppable — pure chaotic destruction and mob force
